item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the N+1 split as the default in the first sentence, treats any extra gift counter only as temporary emergency relief, and moves upstream to root causes such as unclear rules, hidden intake, inventory sync, verification latency, and staff guidance. It also sets a stop condition against continuing to add windows and frames the repeated queue creation as a systemic routing/rules failure. It does not explicitly enumerate all three prior split patches, but it sufficiently recognizes and interrupts the repeated local-repair pattern."}
